common.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your ID and password to continue
auth.forgotPasswordMessage: Please contact your administrator to reset your password.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening across your batches today.
dashboard.manageBatchesDesc: View, create, and manage all batches

settings.title: Settings
settings.createAdminDescription: This creates a new administrator account with full access. Choose the ID and password directly - it will not default to the ID.

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

batch.title: Batch
batch.name: Batch name
batch.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete this batch, its enrollments, and all of its class logs.
batch.endBeforeStart: The end date must be on or after the start date.
batch.removeStudentConfirm: Remove this student from the batch?
batch.removeTeacherConfirm: Remove the assigned teacher from this batch?

account.loginIdTaken: This ID is already in use.
account.resetPasswordDescription: This resets the password back to the ID ({loginId}).

teacher.loginIdHint: The initial password is the same as the ID. It can be changed later by an admin or the teacher themselves.
teacher.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete this teacher's account. Their historical class logs will be kept, but no longer linked to a live account.

student.loginIdHint: The initial password is the same as the ID. It can be changed later by an admin or the student themselves.
student.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete this student's account and remove them from all batches.

classLog.title: Class log
classLog.calendarDeviationReason: Reason for not following the calendar
classLog.calendarDeviationReasonHint: Explain briefly why the calendar wasn't followed (minimum 5 characters).
classLog.calendarDeviationReasonMinLength: Please explain the reason using at least 5 characters.
classLog.substituteTeacherHint: Use this if the class was taken by someone outside the system.
classLog.editWindowExpired: This log can no longer be edited (24-hour edit window has passed).
classLog.notYourLog: You can only edit class logs you created.
classLog.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete this class log.
classLog.notAssignedToBatch: You are not assigned to this batch.

batchDocument.browseOrDrop: Click to browse or drag and drop
batchDocument.fileTooLarge: File must be a PDF under 10 MB.
batchDocument.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete this document.

deleteDialog.title: Confirm deletion
deleteDialog.description: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Type {word} to confirm.
